MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Text Ruling

Notice Of Motion To Quash Defendants Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,020.00 Pursuant To Ccp 2023.030(A)
Off Calendar Aug-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF RENEE WALTON's Motion To Quash Defendant's Subpoenas And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $3,020.00 Pursuant To CCP 2023.030(A).

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

The place of production of the modified subpoenas shall be at Plaintiff's office so that Plaintiff's counsel is offered a "first look" at the records produced, to review for personal and intimate records and provide a detailed privilege log to Defendant CCSF indicating any records withheld and the basis for withholding. The parties shall meet and confer about any allegedly privileged records. If the parties cannot resolve disputes over allegedly privileged records, those records shall be submitted to Judge Pro Tem Thomas A. Cohen at tom@thomascohen.com for an in camera review. Such submission shall be accompanied by a no more than one page brief stating the basis of the respective party's argument.

No sanctions.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Tom Cohen; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported. (302/JPT)
